generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that strengthening our strategic autonomy actually protects civil liberties? By reducing reliance on foreign tech, we minimize surveillance risks and keep control in our own hands. Many experts agree this is the smarter path to true security. #NationalSecurity #TechIndependence
